productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Peach Top
description: Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this peach top from united colors of benetton. This wardrobe staple is a must have, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and comfortable-yet-stylish footwear.Product DetailsPeach top, has scooped neck, short sleeves that Fit up to the elbow and an insert pocket above the right hemMaterial and Care100% viscoseMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
